backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a multi-tenant meal delivery platform with OTP authentication (email/phone via Twilio), user profiles (customer/restaurant/delivery/admin), meal management, order processing, subscription handling, dabba booking system, reviews, Stripe payments, and blob storage integration.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that preserves Stripe configuration during canister upgrades by passing through the old actor state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five high-confidence features: multi-tenant PWA architecture, authentication system with Internet Identity and OTP, customer app with meal browsing and dabba booking, restaurant partner app with meal management, and delivery partner app with order assignment and earnings tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files describing the multi-tenant PWA architecture with four standalone apps (customer, delivery, restaurant, admin), authentication flows, role-specific dashboards, meal ordering, dabba booking, and performance optimizations including lazy loading and prefetching.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, performance optimizations (DNS prefetch, preload critical assets), inline critical CSS for instant first paint, and performance monitoring scripts for tracking Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS, FCP).
frontend/public/manifest-admin.json: PWA manifest for the admin app with slate theme color (#64748b), admin-specific icons, and start URL parameter '?app=admin'.
frontend/public/manifest-customer.json: PWA manifest for the customer app with green theme color (#10b981), customer-specific icons, and start URL parameter '?app=customer'.
frontend/public/manifest-delivery.json: PWA manifest for the delivery partner app with blue theme color (#3b82f6), delivery-specific icons, and start URL parameter '?app=delivery'.
frontend/public/manifest-restaurant.json: PWA manifest for the restaurant partner app with orange theme color (#f97316), restaurant-specific icons, and start URL parameter '?app=restaurant'.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Default PWA manifest using customer app branding with green theme color (#10b981), serving as fallback for the multi-tenant application.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing aggressive caching strategies with multiple cache types (static, runtime, images, API, fonts, prefetch) and cache size limits. Handles install, activate, and fetch events with network-first and cache-first strategies based on resource type.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root component that detects app type (customer, delivery, restaurant, admin, or directory) from URL parameters, subdomains, or paths, then renders the appropriate standalone app. Updates manifest link dynamically based on detected app type.
frontend/src/apps/AdminStandaloneApp.tsx: Admin app entry point that handles authentication (Internet Identity or OTP), profile setup, service worker registration, and renders AdminApp or login/setup prompts. Shows InstallPromptFirst on initial load and tracks performance metrics.
Customer app entry point that manages authentication, profile setup, service worker registration, and renders HomePage or login/setup prompts. Displays InstallPromptFirst initially and logs performance metrics.
Delivery partner app entry point handling authentication, profile setup, service worker registration, and rendering DeliveryApp or login/setup screens. Shows InstallPromptFirst first and tracks performance.
frontend/src/apps/RestaurantStandaloneAp: Restaurant partner app entry point managing authentication, profile setup, service worker registration, and rendering RestaurantApp or login/setup interfaces. Displays InstallPromptFirst initially and monitors performance.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginPrompt: Admin login component with Internet Identity and OTP authentication (email/phone) options, including OTP verification, resend functionality, and Indian phone number validation.
frontend/src/components/AdminProfileSetu: Admin profile setup form that collects the admin's name and saves it using the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook with userType 'admin'.
frontend/src/components/AppDirectory.tsx: Landing page displaying all four Fresh ecosystem apps (Customer, Delivery, Restaurant, Admin) with descriptions, features, and installation links for each PWA.
frontend/src/components/BookingFlow.tsx: Multi-step wizard for creating dabba pickup bookings with address input, time slot selection, and subscription frequency configuration.
frontend/src/components/BookingsView.tsx: Displays list of customer's dabba bookings with details (addresses, time slots, frequency) and allows viewing details and canceling bookings.
frontend/src/components/CustomerLoginPro: Customer login component with Internet Identity and OTP authentication (email/phone) options, including OTP verification, resend functionality, and Indian phone number validation.
frontend/src/components/CustomerProfileS: Form component for creating a customer profile with name and address fields. Sequentially saves user profile and creates customer-specific profile using mutations.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryLoginPro: Multi-tab login interface for delivery partners supporting Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP (Indian numbers only) authentication methods with validation and resend functionality.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryProfileS: Form component for creating a delivery partner profile with name field. Sequentially saves user profile and creates delivery-specific profile using mutations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright notice and attribution to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with Fresh logo, role-based labels (customer/admin/delivery/restaurant), and user dropdown menu with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: PWA install prompt card that appears for non-installed apps, handles beforeinstallprompt event, and supports dismissal with localStorage persistence per app type.
frontend/src/components/InstallPromptFir: First-time PWA install prompt shown before login that checks for standalone mode, handles install flow, and skips to login if already installed or dismissed in session.
frontend/src/components/LazyImage.tsx: A lazy-loading image component that uses IntersectionObserver to defer loading until the image is near the viewport, with shimmer placeholder, error fallback, and priority loading support.
frontend/src/components/MealPlanFlow.tsx: A multi-step flow component for customers to browse available meals, select a meal, choose subscription type (none/weekly/monthly), specify quantity, and place an order.
frontend/src/components/OrdersView.tsx: Displays a customer's order history with details (quantity, price, subscription type, status) and allows leaving reviews with star ratings for delivered orders.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantLoginP: Restaurant-specific login component supporting Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP (Indian numbers only) authentication methods with validation, resend functionality, and status feedback.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantProfil: Form component for restaurants to create their profile with name, description, and operating hours, saving both user profile and restaurant-specific data with admin activation pending.
frontend/src/components/TwilioConfig.tsx: Admin configuration interface for setting up Twilio SMS credentials (Account SID, Auth Token, From Number) to enable phone OTP login across all Fresh apps.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and session persistence using AuthClient from @dfinity/auth-client.
frontend/src/hooks/useOtpAuth.ts: Implements OTP authentication flow for email and phone verification with session management, localStorage persistence, and 5-minute expiry handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, OTP authentication, meals, orders, reviews, subscriptions, and delivery management with proper cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for theming including color schemes for Fresh (green/teal), Delivery (blue), Restaurant (orange), and Admin (slate) apps in light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/performance.ts: Provides performance monitoring utilities for tracking Core Web Vitals (LCP, FID, CLS, FCP, TTFB), marking milestones, measuring durations, and logging comprehensive performance summaries with ratings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AdminApp.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying statistics (customers, restaurants, delivery partners, orders, revenue) with tabs for managing each entity and CSV export functionality. Includes Twilio configuration component and uses lazy loading with prefetching.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryApp.tsx: Delivery partner dashboard for managing availability status, viewing assigned orders and dabba bookings, and updating delivery statuses. Features statistics cards, lazy-loaded images, and background prefetching.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeApp.tsx: Employee/delivery executive portal with similar functionality to DeliveryApp, managing availability, assigned orders, dabba bookings, and delivery status updates. Displays earnings and active delivery statistics.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Customer home page with view routing for booking dabba service, ordering meal plans, and viewing bookings/orders. Implements lazy loading and progressive prefetching of components for performance optimization.
frontend/src/pages/RestaurantApp.tsx: Restaurant dashboard for managing profile, meals (create/edit with image upload), and orders. Displays revenue statistics, active orders, and implements image prefetching with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: TypeScript type definitions for frontend entities including UserProfile, Meal, Order, CustomerProfile, RestaurantProfile, DeliveryPartner, Review, and DabbaBooking, plus enums for order/delivery/subscription statuses and pickup slots.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space for UI components (primary, secondary, sidebar, fresh, delivery themes), container settings, and plugin integrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a multi-tenant food delivery PWA (Dabbawala) with four role-based apps (Customer, Delivery, Restaurant, Admin), listing completed features including authentication, order management, and React Query integration.
